creator: ronald-lists@klop.ws
text:
Created attachment 150651
Fix for reboot and shutdown

In IceWM the reboot and shutdown commands do not work. There is a fix in the upstream bug database, but the project does not receive much love anymore.

http://sourceforge.net/p/icewm/bugs/911/

There is more successful use of this patch:
https://bugs.archlinux.org/task/37884

I added this patch to the port and it fixes the problem for me.
